summary: Live/Archive | Play Announcement after Fast Forward
description:
GIVEN the user is watching a Live Game or Archive Game
AND TTS is enabled
AND the user has Fast Forwarded

steps.action: WHEN the user presses select to play after Fast Forward
steps.result:
THEN the user will hear “<Which half of inning + Inning>, <Away Team + Away Team Score>, <Home Team + Home Team Score>, Press select to Pause” 
For example: "Top of the 5th, Dodgers 3, Yankees 2, Press select to Pause"
